settings.title: Settings
settings.appearanceHint: Choose the visual theme for the interface

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to continue your story
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Start building your worlds and stories

home.title: My worlds
home.emptyTitle: You don't have any worlds yet
home.emptyDescription: Create your first world and start building your story. You can do it manually or let AI surprise you.

create.title: Create new world
create.subtitle: Define the setting where your story will come to life.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the essence of your world...
create.aiPromptLabel: Describe the world you want to create
create.aiPromptPlaceholder: E.g.: A toxic post-apocalyptic world where cities float above clouds of poison...
create.coreAxisDescription: The fundamental premise of your world. A single idea from which everything else derives.
create.coreAxisPlaceholder: In this world, the rain never stops and the continents are covered in living mud that swallows entire cities...
create.richness1: AI has something to work with
create.richness2: AI has a rich world to derive from
create.surpriseMe: Fill in the gaps with suggestions
create.physicalSectionHint: Define the fundamental conditions of your world. You can choose some, all, or none.
create.creativeTension: Creative tension: unexpected combination that enriches your world

edit.title: Edit world
edit.subtitle: Modify the details of your world.

detail.deleteMessage: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all its content. This action cannot be undone.
detail.notFound: The requested world was not found.
detail.noCharactersDesc: Characters breathe life into your world. Create the first one to start building your story.
detail.noScenesDesc: Scenes are the pivotal moments of your story. Create the first one to set the narrative in motion.

create.title: Create character
create.subtitle: Give life to those who will inhabit your world.
create.personalityHint: select the traits that define them
create.aiPromptLabel: Describe the character you want to create
create.aiPromptPlaceholder: E.g.: A noble warrior with a tragic past and unbreakable loyalty...
create.premisePlaceholder: Describe the seed of your character...
create.premiseHint: A sentence that captures the essence of the character you want to create
create.derivationSubtitle: A character that is a consequence of their world, not a decoration upon it.

edit.title: Edit character
edit.subtitle: Modify the details of your character.

detail.deleteMessage: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". This action cannot be undone.

roles.GuerreroDesc: Forged in battle, master of arms and the art of war.
roles.MagoDesc: Commands the arcane arts, studying forces beyond mortal reckoning.
roles.PicaroDesc: Shadow as ally — skilled in deception, theft, and the silent step.
roles.ExploradorDesc: Cartographer of the unknown, a born survivor in uncharted lands.
roles.SanadorDesc: Channels the power of life itself, easing suffering and defying death.
roles.MercaderDesc: Gold moves the world. Knows when to buy, sell... and betray.
roles.NobleDesc: Born into privilege, navigating court intrigue like water through stone.
roles.SacerdoteDesc: Voice of their god in the mortal world, arbiter of the sacred and profane.
roles.VillanoDesc: Dark forces drive them. Their motives, however twisted, follow a terrible logic.
roles.ArtesanoDesc: Crafts with their hands what others only dream. Master of a singular craft.

personalities.ValienteDesc: Faces fear head-on, sometimes without weighing the consequences.
personalities.AstutoDesc: Always three steps ahead. Sees angles where others see only walls.
personalities.CompasivoDesc: The suffering of others strikes them deeply. They act from the heart.
personalities.ArroganteDesc: Certain of their superiority — a trait that opens doors and breeds enemies.
personalities.MisteriosoDesc: Keeps their cards close. Past, motives, loyalties — all in question.
personalities.LealDesc: To the very end. A given word is a blood oath they will never break.
personalities.VengativoDesc: Debts are paid. They do not forget, do not forgive — only wait.
personalities.IngenuoDesc: Sees the good in everyone. An innocence that can be their greatest strength or ruin.
personalities.SabioDesc: Has lived long enough to know when to speak and when to be silent.
personalities.ImpulsivoDesc: Acts before thinking. Their instinct is swift; their regrets, slow.
personalities.ReservadoDesc: Few words, keen observation. What they withhold weighs more than what they say.
personalities.TemerarioDesc: Drawn to risk. They live closer to the edge than to comfort.

create.title: Create scene
create.subtitle: Define the moment that will drive the narrative.
create.locationPlaceholder: E.g.: Harbor tavern, Enchanted forest, Ruined castle...
create.contextPlaceholder: Describe what is happening in this scene...
create.validationError: Please select a time of day and a tone for the scene.
create.aiPromptLabel: Describe the scene you want to create
create.aiPromptPlaceholder: E.g.: A rainy night in a dark alley where two old rivals come face to face...
create.availableCharactersHint: Select the characters that participate in this scene
create.noCharactersInWorld: This world has no characters yet

edit.title: Edit scene
edit.subtitle: Modify the details of your scene.

detail.deleteMessage: This will permanently delete "{{title}}" and all its events. This action cannot be undone.
detail.noCharacters: There are no characters in this scene.
detail.noEvents: There are no events in this scene.
detail.noNarrative: Generate a narrative to weave all the events of this scene into a coherent story.
detail.feedbackPlaceholder: Make it more tense, expand the dialogue, change the point of view...

times.AmanecerDesc: The first light breaks the darkness. The moment of promises and new beginnings.
times.MananaDesc: The day in full swing — the world awake, the bustle underway.
times.MediodiaDesc: Sun at its zenith, heat, and the moment of greatest clarity and exposure.
times.TardeDesc: Shadows lengthen, the pace slows, and quiet confidences begin to surface.
times.AnochecerDesc: Twilight stains the sky. The threshold between day and night.
times.NocheDesc: Darkness and mystery. The city wears a different face when the stars fall.
times.MedianocheDesc: The deepest hour. Secrets, rituals, and what no one should ever see.

tones.EpicoDesc: Legendary deeds, heroic sacrifice, and the weight of fate in every action.
tones.MisteriosoDesc: Unanswered questions, shadows between the lines, and a tension that never relents.
tones.SombrioDesc: Darkness takes center stage. Loss, doubt, and an oppressive atmosphere.
tones.RomanticoDesc: The heart guides every action. Passion, desire, and bonds that transcend.
tones.TensoDesc: Every word matters. Danger lurks and every mistake carries a price.
tones.ComicoDesc: Levity as a weapon. Humor, irony, and moments that ease the weight.
tones.TragicoDesc: The ending is already written. The inevitable beauty of what cannot be undone.
tones.PacificoDesc: No apparent conflict. Room for detail, contemplation, and a breath of stillness.
tones.OminosoDesc: Something wicked draws near. A latent threat that saturates every moment.
tones.IntimoDesc: Behind closed doors, characters reveal themselves. Vulnerability and genuine connection.

importExport.importConfirmMessage: "{{name}}" will be imported as a new world. Continue?
importExport.importInvalidFile: The file is not a valid StoryTeller export.

bible.noCharacters: This world has no characters yet.
bible.noScenes: No scenes in this story yet.

error.notFoundDesc: The URL you entered doesn't exist or has been moved. Please check the address or go back to the home page.

installation.setupDesc: To generate AI content you need a generator running on your machine.
installation.relinkDesc: If you need to link a new machine or reinstall the generator, generate a new token.
installation.offlineMessage: Your generator isn't responding. Make sure the app is running on your machine.
installation.staleWarning: The generator hasn't responded recently — it may need to be restarted.
installation.tokenWarning: This token is single-use. Once used for linking, it cannot be reused.
installation.step1Desc: Ollama runs AI models on your machine. Download and install it:
installation.step2Desc: Open a terminal and run these commands to download the required models:
installation.step3Desc: Use the button below to generate a token. Copy it to your clipboard.
installation.step4Desc: Run the generator with Docker passing your token:
installation.step4Hint: The generator will automatically connect to Ollama and your account. The first run may take a few seconds to pull the image.
installation.bannerDesc: To generate AI content you need a local installation linked to your account.
installation.revokeDialogDesc: This will unlink the generator from your account. Continue?
installation.revokeError: Failed to unlink. Please try again.
installation.guardDesc: This page requires the StoryTeller local generator. Link it from settings to continue.
installation.modelSelectorSubtitle: All models run locally via Ollama.

water.label: Water
water.hint: Where does water come from? Who controls it?

underground.label: Underground only
underground.desc: Deep wells, cenotes, hidden rivers. Whoever digs, holds power.

scarce.label: Scarce and contested
scarce.desc: Oases are capitals, wells are fortresses. Water IS politics.

perpetual_rain.label: Perpetual rain
perpetual_rain.desc: Floods, mold, constant emotional weight. The sky never stops.

ocean_world.label: Ocean without land
ocean_world.desc: Almost everything is sea. Dry land is wealth and myth.

frozen.label: Frozen
frozen.desc: It exists but is locked in ice. The energy to melt it is worth as much as the water.

toxic.label: Toxic
toxic.desc: There is water but it kills untreated. To purify is to hold power.

light.label: Light source
light.hint: What illuminates this world? How is time measured?

dying_sun.label: Dying sun
dying_sun.desc: A weak red light. Each generation notices more cold. A cosmic countdown.

bioluminescence.label: Bioluminescence
bioluminescence.desc: No star. Light comes from the ground, the plants, the creatures.

twin_suns.label: Twin suns
twin_suns.desc: Long days, brief and intense nights. Double shadows.

eternal_twilight.label: Eternal twilight
eternal_twilight.desc: Neither day nor night. Always dawn. Time is measured differently.

erratic_cycles.label: Erratic cycles
erratic_cycles.desc: Light comes and goes without pattern. Days lasting weeks, unpredictable nights.

artificial.label: Artificial light
artificial.desc: Someone controls the light. Someone controls the truth.

climate.label: Climate
climate.hint: What do people struggle against every day?

extreme_seasons.label: Extreme seasons
extreme_seasons.desc: Winters that kill, summers that scorch. Life revolves around preparation.

chaotic.label: Climatic chaos
chaotic.desc: Storms without warning, droughts without pattern. The climate is a character.

tidally_locked.label: Tidally locked
tidally_locked.desc: One side always lit, the other always in shadow. Life on the border.

generational.label: Great cycle
generational.desc: Seasons last generations. No one alive remembers the last summer.

toxic_zones.label: Toxic zones
toxic_zones.desc: Some zones are lethal. Life concentrates where the air is safe.

ash_filled.label: Ash-filled air
ash_filled.desc: Reduced visibility, mask culture, ash-colored skies.

terrain.label: Terrain
terrain.hint: What shape does the surface take? (max 2)

floating_islands.label: Floating archipelago
floating_islands.desc: Islands suspended in the void. To fall is to die. Bridges are power.

underground.label: Underground
underground.desc: Tunnels, caverns, cities carved in rock. No sky.

vertical.label: Vertical structure
vertical.desc: The world is a tower. Altitude = social class. Literally.

infinite_plains.label: Infinite plains
infinite_plains.desc: Horizon in every direction. Nothing hides, nothing blocks the wind.

dense_jungle.label: Dense jungle
dense_jungle.desc: Zero visibility. The path is cut by machete. Vegetation is the antagonist.

ancient_ruins.label: Ancient ruins
ancient_ruins.desc: The world is the corpse of a greater civilization. What did they build?

gravity.label: Gravity
gravity.hint: How does weight feel in this world?

variable.label: Capricious
variable.desc: Changes by zone. Regions of floating stone next to crushing regions.

low.label: Low gravity
low.desc: Long jumps, slow falls. Creatures can be enormous.

crushing.label: Crushing gravity
crushing.desc: Moving is hard. Low, sturdy structures. The sky feels closer.

dying_light.name: The Dying Light
dying_light.desc: A fading sun over a world of ash

floating_world.name: The Floating World
floating_world.desc: Luminous islands suspended in an endless sky

deep_below.name: The Depths Below
deep_below.desc: Civilizations under the rock, lit by life itself

endless_winter.name: The Endless Winter
endless_winter.desc: Ice as far as the eye and memory can reach

dominance.label: Ecological dominance
dominance.hint: What kind of life rules here? What form dominated evolution?

megafauna.label: Megafauna
megafauna.desc: Enormous creatures. Architecture, routes, war: everything revolves around the giants.

swarm.label: Swarms
swarm.desc: Nothing is large, but everything moves in mass. Intelligence is collective, not individual.

flora.label: Dominant flora
flora.desc: Plants rule. They grow, invade, devour. Animals survive in the gaps they leave.

fungal.label: Fungal networks
fungal.desc: Fungi and mycelium connect everything. Information travels underground. Nothing dies without being recycled.

microscopic.label: Microscopic world
microscopic.desc: Visible life is rare or fragile. What truly matters can't be seen with the naked eye.

intelligence.label: Relationship with intelligence
intelligence.hint: Are there intelligent creatures besides the dominant species?

apex_solo.label: Sole sapient species
apex_solo.desc: Only one species thinks. The rest are resources, threats, or scenery.

rival_species.label: Rival species
rival_species.desc: Two or more intelligences compete. Interspecies diplomacy, biological wars.

symbiotic.label: Obligate symbiosis
symbiotic.desc: The dominant species cannot survive without another. They depend on each other.

hive_mind.label: Hive mind
hive_mind.desc: Intelligence does not reside in individuals but in the network. Together, they understand.

uplifted.label: Recently awakened
uplifted.desc: Something gave them intelligence recently. Animal instincts versus new reason.

bio_resource.label: Key biological resource
bio_resource.hint: What does life produce that everyone needs or desires?

living_material.label: Living material
living_material.desc: Bone, silk, chitin, living wood. You build with what grows. To kill is to harvest.

secretion.label: Secretions
secretion.desc: Venom, honey, resin, ink. Something only one organism produces and everyone needs.

spores.label: Spores
spores.desc: They travel with the wind, alter the mind, heal or sicken. Whoever controls the spores controls health.

bio_light.label: Biological light
bio_light.desc: In a dark world, what shines is worth gold. Lantern-creatures, luminous algae farms.

symbiont_access.label: Symbiont access
symbiont_access.desc: Connecting to another creature grants power, knowledge, or health. Not everyone has access.

primordial_jungle.name: The Primordial Jungle
primordial_jungle.desc: Devouring flora, megafauna, and materials that grow from the bones of the dead

the_network.name: The Network
the_network.desc: Fungi connecting everything underground, a distributed mind no one controls

beast_and_rider.name: Beast and Rider
beast_and_rider.desc: Domesticated giants, forced symbiosis, civilization atop something it doesn't understand

power_source.label: Source of power
power_source.hint: What grants power in this society? Who has it, who doesn't?

resource_control.label: Resource control
resource_control.desc: Whoever controls the scarce, commands. Water oligarchies, spore cartels, light monopolies.

knowledge.label: Knowledge
knowledge.desc: Knowledge is power. Scribes, scientists, oracles. Information is hoarded, sold.

lineage.label: Blood and lineage
lineage.desc: Power is inherited. Noble houses, biological castes, genetic lines with real abilities.

combat.label: Strength and combat
combat.desc: Whoever can kill, rules. Arenas, ritual duels, martial meritocracy.

spiritual.label: Spiritual connection
spiritual.desc: Access to something others cannot perceive. Seers, shamans, mediators with the non-human.

core_tension.label: Core tension
core_tension.hint: What is the fracture that divides society?

haves_vs_have_nots.label: Inequality
haves_vs_have_nots.desc: Some have, others don't. The conflict is vertical: top against bottom.

tradition_vs_change.label: Tradition vs. change
tradition_vs_change.desc: Old methods work but limit. New ones promise but risk everything.

isolation_vs_expansion.label: Isolation vs. expansion
isolation_vs_expansion.desc: Stay safe or explore the unknown. Each option has a cost.

species_tension.label: Interspecies tension
species_tension.desc: Coexistence is not easy. Rights, territories, who is "person" and who is not.

memory_vs_forgetting.label: Memory vs. forgetting
memory_vs_forgetting.desc: Something from the past matters. Some want to remember, others want to bury it.

scattered_bands.label: Scattered bands
scattered_bands.desc: Small groups, no state. Survival is local, alliances fragile.

city_states.label: City-states
city_states.desc: Isolated power centers. Each city is a world. Trade and war connect.

empire.label: Empire
empire.desc: A massive structure trying to control everything. Bureaucracy, resistance at the margins.

nomadic.label: Nomadic civilization
nomadic.desc: Nobody stays. Routes are the structure. Meeting points are temporary capitals.

feudal_resource.name: Resource Feudalism
feudal_resource.desc: Noble houses controlling the scarce, fortress-cities, vassals and rebels

nomad_sages.name: The Wandering Sages
nomad_sages.desc: Oral knowledge, caravans of scholars, power in what you know

fractured_coexistence.name: Fractured Coexistence
fractured_coexistence.desc: Multiple species attempting coexistence, laws nobody fully respects

location.emptyDescription: Generate locations from your world's causal graph
